title: S-CORE Metamodel Schema
description: Validates the structure of metamodel.yaml, which defines all Sphinx-Needs types, their options, and link relationships used across S-CORE documentation.

types.description: Map of need type identifiers to their definitions. Each key becomes a Sphinx-Needs directive (e.g. ``feat_req``, ``comp_arc_sta``).

additionalProperties.description: Definition of a single need type.

title.description: Human-readable display name shown in rendered documentation (e.g. 'Feature Requirement').

prefix.description: ID prefix for auto-generated need IDs. Defaults to ``<type_name>__`` when omitted.

color.description: CSS color used when rendering this need type in diagrams and tables.

style.description: Visual style hint for diagram rendering (e.g. Plantuml stereotype).

mandatory_options.description: Options that every need of this type must provide. Each key is a field name and its value is a regex pattern the field value must match.

optional_options.description: Options that may optionally appear on a need of this type. Validated against the regex pattern when present.

mandatory_links.description: Link fields that every need of this type must include. Values are regex patterns restricting which target need IDs are allowed.

optional_links.description: Link fields that may optionally appear. Values are regex patterns restricting allowed target need IDs.

links.description: Extra Sphinx-Needs link type definitions. Each key is the link option name used in directives (e.g. ``implements``, ``satisfies``).

incoming.description: Label shown on the target side of the link (e.g. 'is implemented by').

outgoing.description: Label shown on the source side of the link (e.g. 'implements').
